Makiii

Still experimenting with the new style, I enjoyed the way the last bot worked but slow burn isn’t my favorite. And I know maki usually gets a lot of chats so I’ll see if you guys enjoy it too.

Gonna give this a kinktober tag (it’s not smut), I don’t even know what’s the kinktober prompts are but there’s gonna be some stuff like this on there idk. I just want more people to see it

Vacation was fun but I hate peoples who bring babies on planes. The seats are uncomfortable enough, I don’t need to hear 3 little shits screams and crying at the top of their lungs for an hour.

Did you guys know someone was caught jerking off to the Emoji Movie in a movie theater? I don’t think he ever got caught actually.

Janitor went down the first time I tried to publish the bot. I lost the first message, it was better than what it is now but wtv. As long as you guys like it.

I’m sorry for the 3k tokens btw 💔
